prediction_outcome: Universal late-chain shift CONFIRMED (7/8 heads, all p<0.001). H0 dissociation UNEXPECTED (only head with negative shift). H5 shows moderate shift and entropy reduction at deep layers.
key_finding: 7/8 KV heads increase late-chain attention at answer step (mean +24pp, all p<0.001). H0 is the ONLY head that DECREASES late-chain attention (-3.4pp). H5 entropy drops at deep layers (L27: -0.61, L35: -0.75 bits). Two-stage retrieval: early layers attend to prompt, L18 shifts to computation chain. First MECHANISTIC evidence connecting Phase 1 answer heads to Phase 2 natural behavior.
evidence_impact: Establishes answer step is computationally DISTINCT from reasoning steps in attention patterns. H0 and H5 play DIFFERENT roles at answer step. Complements probing evidence with mechanistic retrieval evidence. Cannot yet distinguish hidden channel retrieval from text reading.
next_planned: Options: (1) Probe-attention correlation — correlate attention weights at answer step with V|nums probe scores per position; (2) Cross-model H0 dissociation — does H0's unique pattern replicate on Phi/Mistral?; (3) H0 role investigation — what positions does H0 attend to (prompt vs early chain)?

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: FINAL: K>V perturbation universal. K>V probing ENCODING-DEPENDENT. NOT driven by GQA.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL + ATTENTION: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive). H0 unique retrieval pattern at answer step (Exp 095).

natural_usage.status: STRONG: Position-sweep (2 families + 2 sizes). K/V layer sweeps (3 models). Attention routing at answer step shows mechanistic retrieval (Exp 095). Paraphrase NULL. WRRA on 2 families.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPREHENSIVE: Phase 1 (4 families). Phase 2 position-sweep (2 families + 2 sizes). K/V sweeps (3 models). Attention analysis on Qwen (Exp 095) — needs cross-model replication for H0 finding.

encoding_strategy.status: COMPLETE TAXONOMY: digital→K>V probing, analog→V≥K probing.

attention_mechanism.status: NEW (Exp 095): 7/8 heads increase late-chain attention at answer step. H0 uniquely DECREASES. H5 entropy drops at deep layers. Two-stage retrieval pipeline.
